command:
for f in packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts; do
  base=$(basename "$f")
  count=$(grep "^[[:space:]]*\"[a-z]" "$f" | wc -l)
  echo "$base: $count keys"
done
reason: Count keys in all locale files
